type.description:
Type of the operation, `attestation` - is operation, which specifies the head of the chain as seen by the attester of a given slot.
The attester is randomly selected to be included in the block that extends the head of the chain as specified in this operation.
A block with more attestations improves the weight of the chain and increases the likelihood of that chain being the canonical one.

id.description: Unique ID of the operation, stored in the TzKT indexer database

level.description: The height of the block from the genesis block, in which the operation was included

timestamp.description: Datetime of the block, in which the operation was included (ISO 8601, e.g. `2020-02-20T02:40:57Z`)

block.description: Hash of the block, in which the operation was included

delegate.description: Information about the baker who sent the operation

deposit.description: Security deposit frozen on the baker's account

rewards.description: Reward of the baker for the operation

quote.description: Injected historical quote at the time of operation
